testcase.name: contextLoads

21:36:48.849 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.bibek.financeTracker.FinanceTrackerApplicationTests]: FinanceTrackerApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:36:48.987 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.bibek.financeTracker.FinanceTrackerApplication for test class com.bibek.financeTracker.FinanceTrackerApplicationTests

Found 4 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-03-07T21:36:51.912+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-03-07T21:36:52.027+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.5.3.Final 2026-03-07T21:36:52.097+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-03-07T21:36:52.697+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-03-07T21:36:52.758+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-03-07T21:36:54.136+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection org.postgresql.jdbc.PgConnection@1c18ee69 2026-03-07T21:36:54.138+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-03-07T21:36:54.261+05:45 WARN 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-07T21:36:55.796+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-03-07T21:36:57.778+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-07T21:36:58.429+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-03-07T21:36:59.052+05:45 WARN 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-03-07T21:36:59.098+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with UserDetailsService bean with name appUserDetailsService 2026-03-07T21:37:00.246+05:45 INFO 6460 --- [financeTracker] [ main] c.b.f.FinanceTrackerApplicationTests : Started FinanceTrackerApplicationTests in 11.034 seconds (process running for 12.33)
